query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Contrition', 'The state of feeling remorseful and penitent', 'Scholars noted a striking contrition between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Contrive', 'To form by an exercise of ingenuity, to devise, invent', 'The author hoped the new policy would contrive tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Controversial', 'Causing disagreement or debate', '“The new law was highly controversial.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Contumacy', 'Disobedience, resistance to authority', 'Critics argued that the plan might contumacy the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Contusion', 'Bruise', 'The essay highlights the contusion of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Convalesce', 'To recover health and strength gradually after sickness', 'The author hoped the new policy would convalesce tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convalescence', 'A gradual healing after illness or injury', 'Her convalescence became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convalescent', 'Recovering one''s health and strength after illness', 'The passage presents a convalescent portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Conven', 'The act of coming together for a meeting or assembly', 'Her conven became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convene', 'To come together, to meet, to unite', 'Critics argued that the plan might convene the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convenience', 'The quality of being suitable, useful or convenient', 'Scholars noted a striking convenience between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convention', 'A meeting or gathering', 'Her convention became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Conventional', 'Based on tradition or what is generally accepted', '“He prefers conventional methods of teaching.”', 'adjective', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Converge', 'Of two or more entities, to approach each other', 'The author hoped the new policy would converge tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convergence', 'The coming together from different directions to meet', 'Critics argued that the plan might convergence the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convergent', 'Coming closer together, to focus', 'Over time, the community learned to convergent its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Conversion', 'The act of having converted something or someone', 'The essay highlights the conversion of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convertible', 'Able to be converted', 'Over time, the community learned to convertible its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convex', 'Curved or bowed outward like the outside of a circle', 'The essay highlights the convex of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convey', 'Expressed or communicated', '“Her tone conveyed her disappointment.”', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Conveyance', 'The act of transporting something', '“The conveyance of goods by ship was delayed.”', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Conviction', 'A belief, a judgement that someone is guilty of a crime', 'Her conviction became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convivial', 'Cheerful and friendly', 'The reviewer described the tone as convivial, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convolut', 'Complicated and difficult to understand', '“The professor’s explanation was too convoluted.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convoluted', 'Extremely complex and difficult to follow', 'The passage presents a convoluted portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convolution', 'Something that is folded or rolled up', 'Her convolution became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convolve', 'To roll or coil together, entwine', 'Critics argued that the plan might convolve the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convoy', 'To escort a group of vehicles, and provide protection', 'Critics argued that the plan might convoy the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convulse', 'To violently shake or agitate', 'Over time, the community learned to convulse its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Convulsion', 'An intense, paroxysmal, involuntary muscular contraction', 'Her convulsion became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Copious', 'Abundant or plentiful', '“She took copious notes during the lecture.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Coquette', 'A woman who flirts or plays with men''s affections', 'Her coquette became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Cordial', 'Warm and friendly, courteous', 'Her cordial became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Cornerstone', 'An important quality or feature on which a thing depends', 'Scholars noted a striking cornerstone between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Cornice', 'An ornamental molding around the top of the wall of a room', 'Scholars noted a striking cornice between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Cornucopia', 'A goat''s horn overflowing with fruit, flowers, grain, etc', 'Her cornucopia became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Corollary', 'A direct or natural consequence or result', 'Scholars noted a striking corollary between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Coronation', 'The ceremony of crowning a sovereign or sovereign''s consort', 'Scholars noted a striking coronation between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Coronet', 'A circular decoration for the head', 'The essay highlights the coronet of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Corp', 'A battlefield formation composed of two or more divisions', 'Her corp became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Corporal', 'Of the human body, physical', 'Her corporal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Corporate', 'Of, or relating to a corporation', 'Over time, the community learned to corporate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Corporeal', 'Tangible, material', 'Her corporeal became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
